name: create_pdf_adobe_acrobat
goal_template: Convert {source_file} to a PDF using Adobe Acrobat, optionally protect with password {password} and reduce file size for email

steps.intent: Initiate PDF creation from a file
steps.target_desc: Create PDF button on the Home screen

steps.intent: Select the source file to convert
steps.target_desc: file browser dialog — navigate and Open

steps.intent: Review the converted PDF on the main canvas
Open the Edit PDF tool if content changes are needed
steps.target_desc: Edit PDF in the right-hand Tools panel

steps.intent: Encrypt the document with a password if one was given
Reduce the file size if reduce_size flag is set
steps.target_desc: File > Save As Other > Reduced Size PDF

steps.intent: Save the final PDF to disk

success_checks: PDF file saved to the specified location without errors
File opens and all content from the source document is visible
Password prompt appears on open if encryption was applied
File size is reduced compared to source if reduce_size was requested
